metadata.title: Image Captions
metadata.description: Adds captions to images when there is alt-text specified

regex.source: .setDesc("For advanced caption parsing, you can add a regex here. The first capturing group will be used as the image caption. This is useful in situations where you might have another plugin or theme adding text to the caption area which you want to strip out. The placeholder example would be used to exclude everything following a pipe character (if one exists).")
regex.target: .setDesc("对于高级标题解析，您可以在此处添加正则表达式。第一个捕获组将用作图像标题。这在其他插件或主题向标题区域添加文本而你又想将其剔除的情况下非常有用。占位符示例将用于排除竖线字符后的所有内容（如果存在）。")
